metadata.description: Three open-source marketing plugins — Digital Marketing Pro, ContentForge, SocialForge. Runs on Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Antigravity. MIT-licensed.

plugins.name: digital-marketing-pro
plugins.description: Open-source AI marketing plugin for agencies — 158 skills, 25 agents, 12-Part Strategy Flow, Cowork-persistent, EU AI Act ready. Runs on Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Antigravity, Hermes Agent, OpenClaw.

plugins.name: contentforge
plugins.description: Open-source enterprise content production plugin — 21 skills, 13 agents, 11 quality gates, 29-pattern AI humanizer, fact-checker, real .docx output with C2PA signing (EU AI Act Article 50). Now native on Hermes Agent + OpenClaw. Installs on Claude Code, Cowork, Codex, Cursor, Copilot CLI, Antigravity, Hermes, OpenClaw + 35+ Agent Skills platforms.

plugins.name: socialforge
plugins.description: Open-source agency-grade social media production plugin — 16 skills, 25 commands, AI image (Nano Banana Pro) + AI video (Kling v3.0 Pro) + C2PA signing (EU AI Act Article 50). Now native on Hermes Agent + OpenClaw. Installs on Claude Code, Cowork, Codex, Cursor, Copilot CLI, Antigravity, Hermes, OpenClaw + 35+ Agent Skills platforms.
